name: writhing_stalker.live_anti_gnome_bad_loiter_mcw
description: Current-build staged/live night anti-gnome row: local-midnight McWilliams fixture moves the player onto the east outside sidewalk, with one hostile writhing stalker already at the bad-position loiter threshold on a reachable outside line. The bounded live window must emit anti_gnome=yes and resolve into a strike/reposition/retreat reason instead of passive window decor.

steps.label: post_load_anti_gnome_bad_loiter_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: the harness-only midnight/bad-loiter writhing-stalker fixture loads to the normal live map before the anti-gnome window runs

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_anti_gnome_bad_loiter
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove local midnight before the anti-gnome bad-loiter writhing-stalker staged row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player turn metadata proves the fixture is at local midnight before the anti-gnome live row

steps.label: audit_saved_outside_line_before_anti_gnome_scene
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not contain the staged outside sidewalk/pavement line before the anti-gnome live row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map metadata proves the transformed player/stalker line is on outside sidewalk/pavement terrain before the anti-gnome live-plan window

steps.label: audit_saved_bad_loiter_stalker_before_anti_gnome_scene
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not contain the transformed hostile writhing stalker with bad-loiter footing before the anti-gnome live row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters metadata proves the transformed fixture contains the hostile writhing stalker plus bad-position loiter counter before the live-plan window

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_anti_gnome_bad_loiter_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded anti-gnome live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_anti_gnome_bad_loiter_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: a short live turn window runs after the anti-gnome bad-loiter stalker fixture; feature proof depends on same-run writhing_stalker live_plan debug lines, not the screenshot alone
steps.failure_rule: if the artifact delta lacks an anti_gnome=yes live_plan line, this scene is inconclusive rather than green

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_anti_gnome_bad_loiter_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain a live anti-gnome bad-loiter resolution line
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the live monster-plan seam saw reachable midnight bad-position loiter and resolved it with the anti-gnome strike reason

recommended_test_command: make -j4 src/writhing_stalker_ai.o obj/monmove.o tests LINTJSON=0 ASTYLE=0 && ./tests/cata_test "[writhing_stalker]" --reporter compact

evidence_contract.claim: current-build staged/live night/outside reachable bad-position loiter resolves into an anti-gnome action instead of passive window decor
evidence_contract.setup_guard: the run uses a harness-only local-midnight save transform plus a save-transformed hostile writhing stalker with bad-position loiter memory; the live_plan line must independently report anti_gnome=yes and the anti-gnome reason as live behavior evidence.
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker anti-gnome behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No anti-gnome live-scene credit if startup/load, saved midnight guard, transformed stalker/bad-loiter footing, safe-mode-off live turn window, and same-run anti_gnome=yes live_plan line are not all present and classified separately.
